summary: Fitie redesign testing completed. Backend: 31/31 tests passed (100%, unchanged from MVP). Frontend: All 5 tabs functional with new FitBuddy-inspired blue design (#0057FF). Design elements verified: blue primary color, light blue cards, pill badges, modern workout cards, calorie ring, weight trend chart.

issues: Deprecation warning: 'shadow*' style props deprecated, should use 'boxShadow' (non-blocking, same as iteration 1)

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend unchanged from MVP - all 31 tests passing
✅ Frontend redesign successful - blue theme (#0057FF) implemented correctly
✅ Design elements verified: 28 blue elements, 62 cards, 16 pill badges
✅ All 5 tabs functional: Home, Activity, Nutrition, Health, Profile
✅ Login page: Blue design with FITIE branding, clean form layout
✅ Home tab: Greeting, streak badge, Daily Challenge blue card, workout cards with action buttons, stats grid
✅ Activity tab: Workout/exercise content (active workout modal from previous testing present)
✅ Nutrition tab: Calorie ring (1045/2200 cal), macro breakdown (Protein/Carbs/Fat), meal list with blue calorie badges
✅ Health tab: Blue 'Analyze Report' card, report list with light blue cards
✅ Profile tab: Blue circular avatar, stats row (Workouts/Streak/Weight), weight trend chart with blue bars, log weight section
✅ Tab navigation: All 5 tabs accessible with proper active state (blue)
✅ Mobile-first design: Proper spacing (8pt grid), adequate touch targets, responsive layout

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 5 tabs functional, redesign complete, all design requirements met)

seed_data_creation: Backend seed data unchanged: 23 exercises, 18 foods, 3 workout plans, admin user (admin@fitie.com / admin123). Test meals and health reports present from previous testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Redesign iteration complete. Backend unchanged and fully functional. Frontend completely redesigned with FitBuddy-inspired blue theme. All design requirements met: blue primary (#0057FF), light blue cards, pill badges, modern workout cards, calorie ring, weight trend chart. Active workout modal present from previous testing (expected). Minor deprecation warnings present but non-blocking.
